name: Ulti (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] If your Leader is multicolored, look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and add up to 1 card to your hand. Then, place the rest at the top or bottom of the deck in any order.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the artist credit (note the lack of pen symbol next to the artist name).
